arts.ttl: Rodri speaks out on player workload and Champions League clash with Inter
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has voiced concerns about the demanding football calendar and hinted at the possibility of player strikes in the future. The Spanish international, who scored the winning goal in last year’s Champions League final against Inter Milan, shared his thoughts ahead of City’s rematch with the Italian side. On the issue of player workload, Rodri stated, “I don’t know the exact number of games that would be right in a season, but over 50 is too many, and 60-70 is unsustainable. arts.sum: Erling Haaland (left) has just one match remaining to break one of Cristiano Ronaldo's (inset) incredible goalscoring records that the Portuguese superstar previously set playing for Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Manchester City v Inter: Match Preview
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to begin their 2024-25 Champions League campaign with a highly anticipated match against Serie A champions Inter Milan at the Etihad Stadium on Wednesday night. This encounter marks the first meeting between the two sides since their dramatic 2023 Champions League final, where City secured a narrow 1-0 victory to complete a historic treble. Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City enter the match in formidable form, boasting a perfect record in the Premier League after four matches. arts.ttl: Rodri sends strike warning as Alisson slams expanded Champions League
arts.sum: Rodri has warned that footballers are ‘close’ to going on strike after Alisson Becker criticised the new Champions League format. Uefa has added two more games to the ‘league phase; of the competition, with clubs facing eight matches before the knockout stage. A new playoff round has also been added to the tournament. arts.ttl: Guardiola: “Inter can win the Champions League”
arts.sum: On the eve of Manchester City’s match against Inter Milan, Pep Guardiola shared his thoughts in a press conference, with the Spanish coach having plenty to say about his teams Italian opponents. Regarding the new Champions League format, Guardiola stated, “We need to win the first game and then the ones after, and we’ll see what happens. We must start well at home and try to begin the season on the right foot.” When asked about Inter, he said, “I rewatched that game yesterday for the first time. arts.ttl: Grealish: “Excited to face Inter again, thy gave us one of the best days ever”
arts.sum: On the eve of Manchester City’s Champions League opener against Inter Milan, a rematch of the 2023 final, Jack Grealish spoke to the club’s official channels. The English winger fondly recalled the joy of that victory while looking ahead to the new challenge. Reflecting on the memorable final, Grealish said, “It was the day we secured the Treble, one of the best days of our lives, so it will be nice to play against them again.” He added, “We hope to go out there, perform well, and get the win.” Grealish emphasized the team’s trust in their process and preparation The post Grealish: “Excited to face Inter again, thy gave us one of the best days ever” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
